name: Sauekraut Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
2. Arrange the sauerkraut over the chicken.
3. Pour the dressing over all the ingredients.
4. Bake in an oven at 350 degrees for 1 hour, or cook in a microwave following converted instructions.
Note: No fat count is provided.
